title: Gjøvik, Innlandet — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Gjøvik, Innlandet: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Gjøvik is a city in Innlandet with a population of 30,000. A town on the western shore of Lake Mjøsa, known for its glassblowing tradition and winter sports.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
